title: Dream: Vanilla Expansion
description: Dream is a mostly vanity mod that aims to add items that act as fillers/expansions on base game content, while aiming to keep grasp of that vanilla MC feel.
body:
Welcome to Dream! A mod designed for the sole purpose of vanity with tid-bits of other functionality.

For compatibility with other mods, see Dream: Compatibility Pack

Whether you are looking for the little aesthetic addon, or the perfect way to flare up your primal wooden combat, Dream has got your back. Current features: Variant Wood Barrels Variant Wood Beehives Variant Wood Bookshelves Variant Wood Mosaic Blocks/Slabs/Stairs Variant Wooden Tools/Weapons
